core_product.name: SignalScan
core_product.description: A comprehensive external digital trust intelligence assessment for founder‑led automotive service businesses. Delivered within 48 hours with actionable recommendations and a clear priority matrix.

entry_product.name: Three‑Signal Preview
entry_product.description: A one‑page glimpse into the client's digital surface containing a positive observation, a verified trust gap, a customer‑journey obstruction, a missed opportunity and an ethical boundary reminder.
entry_product.purpose: Demonstrate immediate value and invite the client to purchase the full SignalScan.

recurring_product.name: SignalWatch
recurring_product.description: Ongoing monitoring and quarterly reassessment of the client's digital surface to detect regressions, new trust gaps and emerging opportunities.

implementation_product.name: SignalRepair
implementation_product.description: Hands‑on support to implement the recommendations identified in SignalScan.  May include design tweaks, copywriting, basic technical fixes or referrals to specialist partners.  Offered only to clients who have completed a SignalScan.
